scope_note: QA Par Number Cert family [151]: certifies Iverson's Double Parity (par) system — 4-way mod-4 classification (2-par=4k+2, 3-par=4k+3, 4-par=4k, 5-par=4k+1). Universal rules: male²=5-par, C=4-par, G=5-par, par multiplication table. Fib_hits observations documented. Source: Iverson QA-2 Ch 3.
